findings.issue: Context file `src/app/api/submissions/[id]/route.ts` does not exist on disk yet — it is produced by Task 4, which is listed in depends_on. This is an expected forward reference, not a defect.
findings.fix: No action needed. The dependency chain (depends_on: [2, 4]) ensures Task 4 runs before Task 7.

findings.issue: Context file paths use `~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/` (global-looking tilde path), but the actual files live at `.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/` inside the project repo. The files do exist; the path resolves correctly in practice, but the notation may confuse agents that expand `~` to the OS home directory.
findings.fix: Consider using a relative path like `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md` or the absolute project path for clarity. Low-priority — the files resolve correctly in context.

findings.issue: depends_on: [2, 4] matches the tech-spec Wave 3 declaration ('T5/T6/T7 depend on T2+T4'). Correct.
Context file `src/app/api/templates/[id]/public/route.ts` does not exist on disk yet — it is produced by Task 3, which is listed in depends_on. This is an expected forward reference, not a defect.
findings.fix: No action needed. depends_on: [3] ensures Task 3 runs before Task 8.

findings.issue: Same `~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/` path ambiguity as Task 7. Files exist at project-local path.
findings.fix: Same as Task 7 — clarify path notation if agents misresolve the tilde.

findings.issue: depends_on: [3] matches tech-spec Wave 3 declaration ('T8 depends on T3'). Correct.

Task 8 instructs copying CSS class constants verbatim from `OnboardingForm.tsx`, which will be deleted in Task 9. Since Task 8 (Wave 3) runs before Task 9 (Wave 4), the file is available as a read reference at execution time. No ordering issue.

depends_on lists only Wave 3 tasks [5, 6, 7, 8] but Task 9 implicitly also depends on Tasks 1–4 (Wave 1+2). The legacy delete is safe only after the new schema (Task 1), APIs (Tasks 2–4), and UI (Tasks 5–8) are live. Tasks 5–8 each depend on Tasks 1–4 transitively, so execution order is always correct, but the omission of Tasks 1–4 from depends_on could allow a misconfigured parallel runner to attempt Task 9 before Wave 2 completes.
findings.fix: Add Tasks 1–4 to depends_on, or note the transitive dependency explicitly: `depends_on: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8]`. Alternatively, document that wave-based ordering guarantees correctness.

findings.issue: All 6 files marked for deletion exist on disk: create-link/route.ts, onboarding/submit/route.ts, [token]/page.tsx, OnboardingForm.tsx, merchants/route.ts, merchants/[id]/status/route.ts — confirmed.
src/middleware.ts exists and is correctly listed as the only file to modify. Scope is appropriately narrow.
No TDD anchor defined — correct, this is a pure deletion task. Build verification (npm run build) is the stated correctness gate.
